Who Am I?

I am a passionate Web Developer and Data Science / Machine Learning Engineer based in Nepal. I specialize in building robust, scalable web applications and developing intelligent ML solutions that solve real-world problems.

With expertise spanning full-stack development to deep learning, I bridge the gap between beautiful user interfaces and powerful data-driven backends.
